metadata.description: Gradle agent tooling: documentation search, source exploration, and idiomatic-implementation grilling

plugins.name: gradle-rag
plugins.description: Search current official Gradle documentation with a local lexical index

plugins.name: gradle-grill
plugins.description: Stress-test Gradle/AGP implementation choices against official docs and relevant source code

plugins.name: agp-sources
plugins.description: Explore Android Gradle Plugin source code from downloaded Google Maven source jars

plugins.name: gradle-sources
plugins.description: Clone, search, and compare Gradle Build Tool source code

plugins.name: kotlin-sources
plugins.description: Clone, search, read, and compare Kotlin compiler and plugin source code

plugins.name: ksp-sources
plugins.description: Clone and search Google KSP source code and KSP1/KSP2 implementation details
